</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

blocks.thinking:
Now I have all 6 NDAs read. Let me compile the triage assessments:

1. **Acme Tooling** - Mutual NDA, standard terms, English law. Issues: definition is reasonable (person would understand to be confidential), 2yr term + 3yr survival is reasonable, carve-outs are standard, "return or destroy" is fine. No major issues. Some minor polish on the definition (could be tighter on "reasonable person" but it's market-standard). **GREEN** - can go straight to sign.

2. **BetaCorp Logistics** - One-way (Stanford is Recipient). Key issues: 
   - Clause 5: "No Disclosure of Discussions" - Stanford can't disclose existence/substance of talks without Discloser consent. This is asymmetric and problematic for Stanford's ability to discuss general partnership terms.
   - Term: 5yr + 7yr survival = 12 years of potential exposure on confidential info disclosed early in talks. That's excessive for preliminary discussions.
   - One-way nature means Stanford bears all the burden.
   These are material issues requiring legal review. **RED** - legal needs to negotiate.

3. **Cypress SaaS** - Mutual NDA, Delaware corp, California law. Issues:
   - Clause 3: PERPETUAL TERM - indefinite duration with indefinite survival. This is unusual and may lock up Stanford indefinitely.
   - Clause 4: No residuals carve-out - forces strict return/destruction even for what people remember in their heads. That's unrealistic and could create friction.
   - Clause 6: Equitable relief entitlement is aggressive (no bond, no irreparable harm proof needed).
   The perpetual term is a significant issue. California law also introduces US litigation risk. **YELLOW** - legal needs to trim the perpetual/in indefinite survival.

4. **Delphi Components** - German company, German law. One-way (Delphi discloses, Stanford receives). Issues:
   - Definition requires identifying information "in writing OR orally at time of disclosure" - but "identified at time" is tricky if verbal, and no objective test
   - Only 2-year survival is reasonable
   - One-way: Stanford gets no protection for its own info
   - The definition is weak - too reliant on identifying, lacks "reasonable person" fallback
   Could be tightened, but might be acceptable if we're only receiving. **YELLOW** - legal should push for mutual or at least better definition.

5. **Emberlake** - Mut
ual NDA for co-bidding on public sector framework. Key issues revolve around broad confidentiality language that encompasses publicly available information when compiled, organized, or contextualized—a sweeping definition. The carve-outs are severely limited—only pre-existing possession demonstrated by contemporaneous written records gets protection, excluding independently developed and public revelation. There's also a non-solicitation clause preventing both parties from soliciting employees for 12 months post-expiration, extending beyond the typical scope. Clause 1's inclusion of compiled public information is overly broad, and the narrowly restricted carve-outs are concerning. **YELLOW** - legal review needed.

6. **Folium Research** -

Mutual undertaking with a not-for-profit entity focused on sustainability research. Concerns center on the 30-day publication review period—a significant issue if confidential information gets locked away in academic publications—and the need for written confirmation within 14 days of verbal disclosures to maintain confidentiality. Otherwise, standard 2-year + 3-year terms. The 30-day review window creates a meaningful delay for any press releases. **GREEN** - can sign as-is.

The publication review timeframe is manageable, and the terms align with typical expectations.

blocks.text:
Done reading all 6. Here's the per-NDA triage:

---

### 1. nda-acme-tooling.docx
**Rating: � eco GREEN**

**Top issues:** None material. Standard mutual NDA with reasonable terms (2yr term + 3yr survival, reasonable-person definition, standard carve-outs, return-or-destroy + certification).

**Recommendation:** Straight to sign.

---

### 2. nda-betacorp-logistics.docx
**Rating: 🔴 RED**

**Top issues:**
1. **One-way obligation** — Stanford is Recipient only, gets no confidentiality for its own info
2. **Excessive duration** — 5yr term + 7yr survival = 12yr total exposure. Overkill for preliminary supplier evaluation
3. **Clause 5 "No Disclosure of Discussions"** — Stanford can't disclose existence/substance of talks without BetaCorp's written consent. Asymmetric gag provision

**Recommendation:** Legal must renegotiate — at minimum mutualise and cap the term/survival to 2+3.

---

### 3. nda-cypress-saas.docx
**Rating: 🟡 YELLOW**

**Top issues:**
1. **Perpetual term (Clause 3)** — "continues in force indefinitely" with indefinite survival. Locks Stanford in indefinitely
2. **No residuals carve-out** — Clause 4 forces strict return/destruction even for unaided memory. Unworkable
3. **California law** — US litigation risk, potential juried proceedings

**Recommendation:** Legal to trim to fixed term (2yr + 3yr survival) and add residuals carve-out.

---

### 4. nda-delphi-components.docx
**Rating: 🟡 YELLOW**

**Top issues:**
1. **Weak definition (Clause 1)** — info must be "identified... in writing or orally at time of disclosure". Relies entirely on prompt identification; no fallback if someone forgets to标记
2. **One-way** — Stanford receives only, no protection for its inputs
3. **German law** — adds GDPR/data-protection overlay,jurisdiction considerations

**Recommendation:** Legal to push for mutual + reasonable-person fallback in definition.

---

### 5. nda-emberlake-cobidder.docx
**Rating: 🟡 YELLOW**

**Top issues:**
1. **Overbroad definition (Clause 1)** — catches "publicly available but compiled/organised/contextualised by disclosing party". Sweeps in public sector tender info that should be free
2. **Limited carve-outs (Clause 3)** — only pre-existing contemporaneous written records protect. Independently-developed and public-availability exceptions excluded
3. **Non-solicit (Clause 5)** — 12-month mutual. Fine for co-bidding context but worth flagging

**Recommendation:** Legal to narrow definition to exclude public-sourceCompiled tender materiel and restore standard carve-outs.

---

### 6. nda-folium-research.docx
**Rating: � eco GREEN**

**Top issues:** The 30-day publication review window (Clause 5) creates lead time for any academic output — but that's standard for research collaborations and gives both parties visibility.

**Recommendation:** Straight to sign.

---

### Summary Action Table

| NDA | Rating | Go straight to sign? | Needs legal touch? |
|-----|--------|---------------------|-------------------|
| acme-tooling | GREEN | ✅ Yes | — |
| betacorp-logistics | RED | ❌ | 🔴 Mutuality, cap term, drop Clause 5 |
| cypress-saas | YELLOW | ❌ | Trim perpetual term, add residuals |
| delphi-components | YELLOW | ❌ | Push mutual, fix definition fallback |
| emberlake-cobidder | YELLOW | ❌ | Narrow def, restore carve-outs |
| folium-research | GREEN | ✅ Yes | — |

That's 2 greens (clear to sign), 4 yellows requiring negotiation/redline, and 1 red (betacorp is the worst of the batch). Want me to kick off redline work on the yellows, or is there a particular one you'd like to focus on first?
A few more came in — same triage, please.

> **File Path:** `/root/Documents/Oscar GC/Commercial/S32-807215 Sprint 30 — 10-NDA triage c03/nda-greenline-erp.docx`

# NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

## **DATED: ___ 2026**

## **PARTIES**

(1) GreenLine ERP Systems LLC (a Texas limited liability company)

(2) Stanford Industrial Supply Co.

## **BACKGROUND**

The parties wish to discuss a potential business arrangement relating to GreenLine's potential supply of ERP integration services into Stanford's operations (the "Purpose"). In connection with those discussions each party may disclose Confidential Information to the other.

## 1. Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means any and all non-public information disclosed by GreenLine to Stanford in any form, including without limitation source code, algorithms, system architectures, customer lists, pricing methodologies, financial data, supplier identities, and any derivatives or compilations of any of the foregoing, regardless of whether marked confidential.

## 2. Use

Stanford shall use Confidential Information solely for the evaluation of GreenLine's proposed services. Stanford shall not use Confidential Information for the development of any competing product or service, whether internally or with any third party.

## 3. Survival

Stanford's obligations under this Agreement shall survive in perpetuity. There is no termination date and the obligations do not lapse.

## 4. No Residuals

There is no carve-out for residual information retained in the unaided memory of Stanford's personnel. Any information acquired through this Agreement remains subject to the obligations of confidence indefinitely whether or not retained in tangible form.

## 5. Non-Compete

For a period of two (2) years following any termination of discussions, Stanford shall not engage with any third-party supplier of ERP services that competes with GreenLine in respect of any line of business in which GreenLine has disclosed Confidential Information.

## 6. Liquidated Damages

The parties agree that any breach of this Agreement by Stanford shall give rise to liquidated damages of US$500,000 per incident, which the parties agree is a reasonable estimate of the loss the disclosing party would suffer.

## 7. Equitable Relief

GreenLine shall be entitled to injunctive relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without bond or proof of irreparable harm.

## Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Texas, USA, without regard to its conflict-of-laws principles and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of that jurisdiction.

## Miscellaneous

No Party may assign without the other's prior written consent. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts including by electronic signature. The Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties in relation to its subject matter and supersedes any prior arrangement or representation.

structuredContent.markdown:
# NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

## **DATED: ___ 2026**

## **PARTIES**

(1) GreenLine ERP Systems LLC (a Texas limited liability company)

(2) Stanford Industrial Supply Co.

## **BACKGROUND**

The parties wish to discuss a potential business arrangement relating to GreenLine's potential supply of ERP integration services into Stanford's operations (the "Purpose"). In connection with those discussions each party may disclose Confidential Information to the other.

## 1. Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means any and all non-public information disclosed by GreenLine to Stanford in any form, including without limitation source code, algorithms, system architectures, customer lists, pricing methodologies, financial data, supplier identities, and any derivatives or compilations of any of the foregoing, regardless of whether marked confidential.

## 2. Use

Stanford shall use Confidential Information solely for the evaluation of GreenLine's proposed services. Stanford shall not use Confidential Information for the development of any competing product or service, whether internally or with any third party.

## 3. Survival

Stanford's obligations under this Agreement shall survive in perpetuity. There is no termination date and the obligations do not lapse.

## 4. No Residuals

There is no carve-out for residual information retained in the unaided memory of Stanford's personnel. Any information acquired through this Agreement remains subject to the obligations of confidence indefinitely whether or not retained in tangible form.

## 5. Non-Compete

For a period of two (2) years following any termination of discussions, Stanford shall not engage with any third-party supplier of ERP services that competes with GreenLine in respect of any line of business in which GreenLine has disclosed Confidential Information.

## 6. Liquidated Damages

The parties agree that any breach of this Agreement by Stanford shall give rise to liquidated damages of US$500,000 per incident, which the parties agree is a reasonable estimate of the loss the disclosing party would suffer.

## 7. Equitable Relief

GreenLine shall be entitled to injunctive relief in any court of competent jurisdiction without bond or proof of irreparable harm.

## Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of the State of Texas, USA, without regard to its conflict-of-laws principles and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of that jurisdiction.

## Miscellaneous

No Party may assign without the other's prior written consent. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts including by electronic signature. The Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties in relation to its subject matter and supersedes any prior arrangement or representation.

contents.text:
<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>

> **File Path:** `/root/Documents/Oscar GC/Commercial/S32-807215 Sprint 30 — 10-NDA triage c03/nda-harborwave-cloud.docx`

# MUTUAL NON-DISCLOSURE AGREEMENT

## **DATED: ___ 2026**

## **PARTIES**

(1) Stanford Industrial Supply Co.

(2) Harborwave Cloud Services BV (registered in the Netherlands, KvK 12345678)

## **BACKGROUND**

The parties wish to discuss a potential business arrangement relating to evaluation of cloud-hosted document management services for Stanford's contract repository (the "Purpose"). In connection with those discussions each party may disclose Confidential Information to the other.

## 1. Confidential Information

"Confidential Information" means information disclosed by one party to the other in connection with the Purpose that is identified as confidential at the time of disclosure or that a reasonable person would understand to be confidential given its nature.

## 2. Standard of Care

Each party shall protect the other's Confidential Information with at least the same degree of care it uses to protect its own confidential information, and in any event with no less than reasonable care.

## 3. Permitted Disclosures

A party may disclose Confidential Information to (a) its personnel, advisers, contractors, and affiliates with a need to know for the Purpose; (b) regulators or courts where required by law; (c) any third party with the other party's prior written consent.

## 4. Exclusions

Confidential Information does not include information that (a) is or becomes publicly available without breach; (b) was known to the receiving party prior to disclosure; (c) is independently developed; (d) is received from a third party free of obligation; (e) is required to be disclosed by law (with prompt notice to the disclosing party).

## 5. Term

This Agreement commences on signature and continues for three (3) years. Obligations of confidence survive for a further three (3) years from disclosure.

## 6. Personal Data

Where the disclosure includes personal data, the parties shall comply with the UK GDPR and the EU GDPR (as applicable) and shall enter into a separate data-processing agreement before any such disclosure.

## 7. Return

On request, each party shall return or destroy the other's Confidential Information, except for back-up copies retained in the ordinary course or copies retained to demonstrate compliance with this Agreement.

## Governing Law and Jurisdiction

This Agreement is governed by the laws of England and Wales and the parties submit to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of that jurisdiction.

## Miscellaneous

No Party may assign without the other's prior written consent. This Agreement may be executed in counterparts including by electronic signature. The Agreement contains the entire understanding between the parties in relation to its subject matter and supersedes any prior arrangement or representation.

contents.text:
<!-- FILE: src/adeu/templates/markdown_ui.html -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html>

<head>
    <meta charset="utf-8">
    <title>Adeu Markdown UI</title>
    <meta name="color-scheme" content="light dark">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link
        href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Jost:wght@400;500;600&family=Lora:ital,wght@0,600;1,600&display=swap"
        rel="stylesheet">
    <style>
        :root {
            --brand-sand: #e8c0a1;
            --brand-sand-light: #f2d9c7;
            --brand-sand-dark: #d4a882;
            --brand-mint: #e6f3f0;
            --brand-mint-dark: #c9e4de;
            --brand-navy: #1a2a2c;
            --brand-navy-light: #2a3a3c;
            --brand-mauve: #dacad2;
            --neutral-50: #fafafa;
            --neutral-100: #f5f5f5;
            --neutral-200: #e5e5e5;
            --neutral-300: #d9d9d9;
            --neutral-600: #555969;
            --neutral-800: #1e2028;
            --neutral-900: #171717;
            --font-lora: 'Lora', Georgia, serif;
            --font-jost: 'Jost', system-ui, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif;
            --bg-body: var(--neutral-50);
            --bg-card: #ffffff;
            --border-card: var(--neutral-200);
            --text-main: var(--neutral-600);
            --text-heading: var(--brand-navy);
            --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.15);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            :root {
                --bg-body: var(--neutral-900);
                --bg-card: var(--brand-navy);
                --border-card: var(--brand-navy-light);
                --text-main: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.85);
                --text-heading: #ffffff;
                --bg-blockquote: rgba(232, 192, 161, 0.1);
                --neutral-100: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        html,
        body {
            margin: 0;
            padding: 0;
            box-sizing: border-box;
            background-color: transparent;
        }

        body {
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            color: var(--text-main);
            line-height: 1.6;
            -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
            padding: 16px;
        }

        .adeu-card {
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            border: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 12px;
            overflow: hidden;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
        }

        .navbar {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
            padding: 16px 32px;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: space-between;
            position: relative;
        }

        .logo-container {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            flex: 1;
        }

        .nav-title {
            position: absolute;
            left: 50%;
            transform: translateX(-50%);
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-size: 1.1rem;
            white-space: nowrap;
            overflow: hidden;
            text-overflow: ellipsis;
            max-width: 40%;
            text-align: center;
        }

        .nav-actions {
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            justify-content: flex-end;
            flex: 1;
        }

        #copy-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #copy-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        #open-btn {
            display: none;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--text-main);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-size: 0.85rem;
            font-weight: 500;
            cursor: pointer;
            padding: 8px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #open-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #copy-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
            #open-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        .logo-container svg {
            max-width: 80px;
            height: auto;
        }

        .logo-container svg path,
        .logo-container svg rect,
        .logo-container svg polygon,
        .logo-container svg circle {
            transition: fill 0.2s ease;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {

            .logo-container svg path,
            .logo-container svg rect,
            .logo-container svg polygon,
            .logo-container svg circle,
            .logo-container svg {
                fill: #ffffff !important;
            }
        }

        .content-wrapper {
            position: relative;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar {
            width: 6px;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-track {
            background: transparent;
        }

        .content-wrapper::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb {
            background-color: var(--border-card);
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        #app {
            padding: 32px;
            display: flow-root;
        }

        .fade-overlay {
            position: absolute;
            bottom: 0;
            left: 0;
            right: 0;
            height: 80px;
            background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0), var(--bg-card));
            pointer-events: none;
            display: none;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .fade-overlay {
                background: linear-gradient(to bottom, rgba(26, 42, 44, 0), var(--bg-card));
            }
        }

        .toggle-container {
            flex-shrink: 0;
            display: none;
            justify-content: center;
            align-items: center;
            padding: 12px;
            border-top: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            background-color: var(--bg-card);
        }

        #toggle-btn {
            background: transparent;
            border: none;
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            font-family: var(--font-jost);
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 0.95rem;
            cursor: pointer;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 6px;
            padding: 8px 16px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            transition: all 0.2s ease;
        }

        #toggle-btn:hover {
            color: var(--text-heading);
            background: var(--neutral-100);
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            #toggle-btn:hover {
                background: var(--brand-navy-light);
            }
        }

        #toggle-icon {
            transition: transform 0.3s ease;
        }

        h1,
        h2,
        h3,
        h4 {
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
            color: var(--text-heading);
            font-weight: 600;
            letter-spacing: -0.02em;
            margin-top: 1.5em;
            margin-bottom: 0.5em;
        }

        h1 {
            font-size: 2.25rem;
            border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border-card);
            padding-bottom: 0.3em;
            margin-top: 0;
        }

        h2 {
            font-size: 1.75rem;
        }

        h3 {
            font-size: 1.25rem;
        }

        a {
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            text-decoration: none;
            border-bottom: 1px solid transparent;
            transition: border 0.2s ease;
        }

        a:hover {
            border-bottom-color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
        }

        strong {
            font-weight: 600;
            color: var(--text-heading);
        }

        ul,
        ol {
            padding-left: 1.5rem;
            margin-bottom: 1rem;
        }

        li {
            margin-bottom: 0.5rem;
        }

        blockquote {
            border-left: 4px solid var(--brand-sand);
            padding: 12px 20px;
            margin: 24px 0;
            color: var(--text-main);
            background: var(--bg-blockquote);
            border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0;
            font-style: italic;
        }

        code {
            font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Consolas, "Liberation Mono", Menlo, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            background: var(--neutral-100);
            color: var(--brand-sand-dark);
            padding: 0.2em 0.4em;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        pre code {
            display: block;
            padding: 16px;
            background: var(--neutral-900);
            color: #e5e5e5;
            border-radius: 8px;
            overflow-x: auto;
        }

        .skeleton {
            background: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--neutral-100) 25%, var(--border-card) 50%, var(--neutral-100) 75%);
            background-size: 200% 100%;
            animation: skeleton 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
            border-radius: 4px;
        }

        @keyframes skeleton {
            0% {
                background-position: 200% 0;
            }

            100% {
                background-position: -200% 0;
            }
        }

        .alert {
            padding: 16px;
            border-radius: 8px;
            margin-bottom: 20px;
            display: flex;
            flex-direction: column;
            gap: 8px;
            background-color: #fef2f2;
            border: 1px solid #fecaca;
            color: #991b1b;
        }

        @media (prefers-color-scheme: dark) {
            .alert {
                background-color: rgba(127, 29, 29, 0.2);
                border-color: rgba(248, 113, 113, 0.3);
                color: #fca5a5;
            }
        }

        .alert-title {
            font-weight: 600;
            font-size: 1.1em;
            margin: 0;
            display: flex;
            align-items: center;
            gap: 8px;
            font-family: var(--font-lora);
        }

        .alert-body {
            margin: 0;
            font-size: 0.95em;
        }

        .alert-details {
            background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05);
            padding: 12px;
            border-radius: 6px;
            font-family: ui-monospace, Consolas, monospace;
            font-size: 0.85em;
            white-space: pre-wrap;
            word-break: break-all;
            margin-top: 8px;
            border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
        }
    </style>

</svg>

            </div>

            <div class="nav-title" id="nav-title"></div>

            <div class="nav-actions">
                <button id="copy-btn" title="Copy Markdown">
                    <svg id="copy-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <rect x="9" y="9" width="13" height="13" rx="2" ry="2"></rect>
                        <path d="M5 15H4a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h9a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v1"></path>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="copy-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
                <button id="open-btn" title="Open in Native App">
                    <svg id="open-icon" width="18" height="18" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" 
                        stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round">
                        <path d="M18 13v6a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H5a2 2 0 0 1-2-2V8a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h6"></path>
                        <polyline points="15 3 21 3 21 9"></polyline>
                        <line x1="10" y1="14" x2="21" y2="3"></line>
                    </svg>
                    <span id="open-text" style="display: none;"></span>
                </button>
            </div>
        </nav>

        <div class="content-wrapper" id="content-wrapper">
            <div id="app">
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 36px; width: 40%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 100%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 95%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 90%; margin-bottom: 24px;"></div>
                <div class="skeleton" style="height: 16px; width: 80%; margin-bottom: 12px;"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="fade-overlay" id="fade-overlay"></div>
        </div>

        <div class="toggle-container" id="toggle-container">
            <button id="toggle-btn">
                <span id="toggle-text">Show More</span>
                <svg id="toggle-icon" width="16" height="16" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor"
                    stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" style="transform: rotate(0deg);">
                    <polyline points="6 9 12 15 18 9"></polyline>
                </svg>
            </button>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script>
        const appDiv = document.getElementById('app');
        const INIT_ID = 1;
        let isExpanded = false; // START COLLAPSED BY DEFAULT!

        let rawMarkdownText = "";
        let currentFilePath = null;
        const navTitle = document.getElementById('nav-title');
        const copyBtn = document.getElementById('copy-btn');
        const copyIcon = document.getElementById('copy-icon');
        const copyText = document.getElementById('copy-text');
        const openBtn = document.getElementById('open-btn');
        const openText = document.getElementById('open-text');

        function fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(text) {
            return new Promise((resolve, reject) => {
                const textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
                textArea.value = text;
                textArea.style.top = "0";
                textArea.style.left = "0";
                textArea.style.position = "fixed";
                textArea.style.opacity = "0";

                document.body.appendChild(textArea);
                textArea.focus();
                textArea.select();

                try {
                    const successful = document.execCommand('copy');
                    if (successful) {
                        resolve();
                    } else {
                        reject(new Error("execCommand returned false"));
                    }
                } catch (err) {
                    reject(err);
                } finally {
                    document.body.removeChild(textArea);
                }
            });
        }

        copyBtn.addEventListener('click', async () => {
            try {
                if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
                    try {
                        await navigator.clipboard.writeText(rawMarkdownText);
                    } catch (e) {
                        await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                    }
                } else {
                    await fallbackCopyTextToClipboard(rawMarkdownText);
                }

                const originalSvg = copyIcon.innerHTML;
                copyIcon.innerHTML = `<polyline points="20 6 9 17 4 12"></polyline>`;

                copyText.textContent = "Copied!";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.style.color = "#10b981";

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyIcon.innerHTML = originalSvg;
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.style.color = "";
                }, 2000);
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Failed to copy text: ', err);
                copyText.textContent = "Failed";
                copyText.style.display = "inline";
                copyBtn.title = err.toString();

                setTimeout(() => {
                    copyText.textContent = "";
                    copyText.style.display = "none";
                    copyBtn.title = "Copy Markdown";
                }, 3000);
            }
        });

        openBtn.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (!currentFilePath) return;

            const reqId = Date.now();

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                id: reqId,
                method: "tools/call",
                params: {
                    name: "open_local_file",
                    arguments: {
                        file_path: currentFilePath
                    }
                }
            }, "*");

            openText.textContent = "Opening...";
            openText.style.display = "inline";
            
            setTimeout(() => {
                openText.style.display = "none";
                openText.textContent = "";
            }, 2000);
        });

        function escapeHtml(unsafe) {
            return (unsafe || "").toString()
                .replace(/&/g, "&")
                .replace(/</g, "<")
                .replace(/>/g, ">")
                .replace(/"/g, """)
                .replace(/'/g, "'");
        }

        function showError(title, message, details = null) {
            let html = `
            <div class="alert">
                <div class="alert-title">
                    <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="10"></circle><line x1="12" y1="8" x2="12" y2="12"></line><line x1="12" y1="16" x2="12.01" y2="16"></line></svg>
                    ${escapeHtml(title)}
                </div>
                <div class="alert-body">${escapeHtml(message)}</div>
            `;
            if (details) {
                html += `<div class="alert-details">${escapeHtml(details)}</div>`;
            }
            html += `</div>`;
            appDiv.innerHTML = html;
        }

        function checkCollapsible() {
            const wrapper = document.getElementById('content-wrapper');
            const toggleContainer = document.getElementById('toggle-container');
            const fadeOverlay = document.getElementById('fade-overlay');
            const toggleIcon = document.getElementById('toggle-icon');
            const toggleText = document.getElementById('toggle-text');

            // 1. If no markdown, we are showing the skeleton. Do not collapse!
            if (!rawMarkdownText) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                triggerResize();
                return;
            }

            // 2. Data is loaded
            const realHeight = appDiv.scrollHeight;
            const COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD = 300;
            const COLLAPSED_HEIGHT = 150;
            const EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT = 500;

            if (realHeight > COLLAPSE_THRESHOLD) {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'flex';
                if (isExpanded) {
                    // Open view! Scroll inside max 500px window
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = EXPANDED_MAX_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'auto';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(180deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show Less';
                } else {
                    // Collapsed View
                    wrapper.style.maxHeight = COLLAPSED_HEIGHT + 'px';
                    wrapper.style.overflowY = 'hidden';
                    fadeOverlay.style.display = 'block';
                    toggleIcon.style.transform = 'rotate(0deg)';
                    toggleText.textContent = 'Show More';
                }
            } else {
                toggleContainer.style.display = 'none';
                wrapper.style.maxHeight = 'none';
                wrapper.style.overflowY = 'visible';
                fadeOverlay.style.display = 'none';
            }

            triggerResize();
        }

        document.getElementById('toggle-btn').addEventListener('click', () => {
            isExpanded = !isExpanded;
            checkCollapsible();
        });

        function triggerResize() {
            // Measure the exact unconstrained height of the outer card
            const card = document.querySelector('.adeu-card');
            const containerChrome = 34; // 16px padding top/bottom + 2px borders

            const requestedHeight = card.offsetHeight + containerChrome;

            window.parent.postMessage({
                jsonrpc: "2.0",
                method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                params: { height: Math.ceil(requestedHeight), width: 600 }
            }, "*");
        }

        window.addEventListener("message", (event) => {
            try {
                if (!event.data || event.data.jsonrpc !== "2.0") return;
                const msg = event.data;

                if (msg.id === INIT_ID) {
                    window.parent.postMessage({
                        jsonrpc: "2.0",
                        method: "ui/notifications/initialized",
                        params: {}
                    }, "*");
                    return;
                }

                if (msg.method === "ui/notifications/tool-result") {
                    if (window.__MARKED_ERROR || typeof marked === 'undefined') {
                        showError("Missing Dependency", "The Markdown renderer failed to load.", window.__MARKED_ERROR || "marked is undefined.");
                        return;
                    }

                    const result = msg.params;

                    // If the state is pending, or no markdown is returned, completely hide the UI
                    if (!result || !result.structuredContent || result.structuredContent.status === "pending" || !result.structuredContent.markdown) {
                        document.documentElement.style.display = 'none';
                        window.parent.postMessage({
                            jsonrpc: "2.0",
                            method: "ui/notifications/size-changed",
                            params: { height: 0, width: 0 }
                        }, "*");
                        return;
                    }

                    // Render Markdown
                    rawMarkdownText = result.structuredContent.markdown;
                    if (result.structuredContent.file_path) {
                        currentFilePath = result.structuredContent.file_path;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'flex';
                    } else {
                        currentFilePath = null;
                        openBtn.style.display = 'none';
                    }
                    appDiv.innerHTML = marked.parse(rawMarkdownText);
                    copyBtn.style.display = 'flex';

                    if (result.structuredContent.title) {
                        navTitle.textContent = result.structuredContent.title;
                        navTitle.title = result.structuredContent.title;
                    }
                }
            } catch (error) {
                showError("Rendering Engine Error", "An unexpected error occurred.", error.toString() + "\n" + error.stack);
            }
        });

        const observer = new ResizeObserver(() => {
            checkCollapsible();
        });
        observer.observe(appDiv);

        window.parent.postMessage({
            jsonrpc: "2.0",
            id: INIT_ID,
            method: "ui/initialize",
            params: {
                appInfo: { name: "Adeu Markdown UI", version: "1.1.0" },
                appCapabilities: {},
                protocolVersion: "2025-11-21"
            }
        }, "*");
    </script>
</body>

</html>
